column1: # Cross-Framework Mapping TISAX (VDA ISA 6.0.4) <-> ISO 22301:2019 (+ 22313:2020 guidance)
# Source: VDA ISA 6.0.4 availability and BCM provisions.

column9: Planning Information Security Continuity — directly corresponds to ISO 22301 Clause 8.4 Business Continuity Plans.
Exercise programme (Clause 8.5) — TISAX requires testing of BC plans.
Capacity management supports BIA output — availability planning.
Response to incidents — Clause 8.4.3 warning and communication.
Information security policy — leadership and commitment (Clause 5.1).
Risk assessment feeds BCMS risk treatment (Clause 6.1).
Risk treatment — continuity strategies as treatment option.
